title: Figure 2.1 Circuits for Ex. 2.4.
summary: This page continues Example 2.4 by determining the zero-input response initial conditions for an RLC circuit. It derives ẏ0(0) = -5 from the loop equation, gives y0(t) = -5e^(-t) + 5e^(-2t), and then begins comparing total-response conditions at t = 0− and t = 0+.

figures.caption: Circuits for Ex. 2.4 showing two RLC loop circuit diagrams labeled (a) and (b)
